nasb.text: For the Lord has made the Jordan a border between us and you, you sons of Reuben and sons of Gad; you have no portion in the Lord.” So your sons may make our sons stop fearing the Lord.’

esv.text: For the Lord has made the Jordan a boundary between us and you, you people of Reuben and people of Gad. You have no portion in the Lord.’ So your children might make our children cease to worship the Lord.

cnv.text: 流本人和迦得人啊，耶和華定了約旦河作我們和你們中間的疆界；你們與耶和華無分了。’這樣，你們的子孫就使我們的子孫不再敬畏耶和華了。

ccb.text: 耶和华把约旦河定为我们跟你们吕便和迦得人的边界，你们与耶和华一点关系也没有。’这样，恐怕你们的子孙会使我们的子孙不再敬畏耶和华。
